question: Translate: The party will start in the evening.
expected_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
learner_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
note: deterministic fast path — zero LLM cost

question: Translate: The party will start in the evening.
expected_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
learner_answer: la fête commencera dans la soirée.

question: Translate: The party will start in the evening.
expected_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
learner_answer: La fete commencera dans la soiree.

question: Translate: The party will start in the evening.
expected_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
learner_answer: La fête va commencer dans la soirée.
note: false-negative guard: valid alternative tense must be accepted

question: Translate: The party will start in the evening.
expected_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
learner_answer: La fête commencera dans le soirée.
note: V1 draft failure: grader forgave 'le soirée' as an accent issue. Prompt now separates accent mistakes (diacritics only) from grammar mistakes (never forgiven) — gender is often the tested point

question: Translate: The party will start in the evening.
expected_answer: La fête commencera dans la soirée.
learner_answer: La fête commencera dans le matin.
note: V1 draft gave q=2 with confused feedback; wrong word now capped at 1
